creator: kes-freebsd@h3m3.com
text:
Created attachment 200410
Patch to update net/py-gntp to 1.0.3

This patch will update net/py-gntp to version 1.0.3. It also changes a few USES options to allow it to install with multiple versions of python, and fixes a few Makefile style issues that portlint gave warnings about.
